summary.narrative: Vi Lyles has served as Charlotte mayor since 2017, winning four consecutive elections with landslide margins. Key focus areas include racial equity, public safety, affordable housing, and transportation infrastructure. Mixed results on signature initiatives.
summary.grade_rationale: Strong electoral mandate and relationship-building with state legislature. Racial Equity Initiative well-funded ($250M). However, affordable housing crisis remains unresolved despite longstanding promises. Public safety improvements show only incremental progress.

promises.normalized: Implement comprehensive racial equity initiative and reduce systemic barriers
Address affordable housing crisis through expanded development programs
Improve public safety through SAFE Charlotte plan and accountability measures
Establish 1% sales tax referendum to fund transportation infrastructure plan

data_gaps: Specific measurable outcomes for Racial Equity Initiative beyond $250M allocation
Quantified affordable housing units created/targeted vs. promised
SAFE Charlotte plan implementation metrics and effectiveness data
Transportation referendum outcome and timeline for infrastructure delivery
Repeat offender prosecution rates and mental health service capacity improvements
Community feedback on six corridors of opportunity investment results
